description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Add the two cheapest different size M band T‑shirts priced under $30 each to your cart and open the cart page.

tasks.instruction: Play the newest published music video released in 2023 or later and add it to a playlist called "Favorites."

tasks.instruction: Create a new playlist named "Workout Mix" with exactly 5 tracks between 3 and 5 minutes long, including tracks from at least three different albums, then open that playlist.

tasks.instruction: For a Los Angeles show taking place in August 2025, select two tickets of the second‑cheapest available ticket type and proceed to checkout.

tasks.instruction: Choose between the standard and deluxe digital editions of the same album, adding the digital edition with more tracks to your cart if it costs at most $20, otherwise add the standard digital edition instead.

tasks.instruction: Subscribe to the band’s email newsletter using a sample name and email, select at least three interests including tours, new releases, and merch offers, set the frequency to weekly, and submit the form.

tasks.instruction: Filter the blog to posts from 2024 tagged "Tour Diary," save three of those posts to your reading list, then open one of the saved posts from that list.

target_names: Tour Diary 2024: Late-Night Diners Across North America

tasks.instruction: From the store, add the third vinyl record priced at $40 or less and the most expensive hoodie priced at $60 or less to your cart, then if the cart subtotal is over $100, replace the hoodie with one priced under $50 and review the cart.
